text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm back on set helping out with Taiki
Shuttle's movie.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We're finally shootin' the action-packed climax!
You better believe I'm gonna nail this
performance!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
We've come a long way, everyone! Today's a
really important day on set, so let's do our best
and get it just r—

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
Is that... rain?! You've gotta be kidding me!
Everyone, quick, pack up the set!

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member A
text_block_list.text:
Looks like it's letting up for now, but it might
start up again. It's gonna be hard to shoot an
action scene in these conditions.

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member B
text_block_list.text:
It'll be even tougher if we have to postpone the
shoot. We're at the end of our rope for both the
deadline and our budget.

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
Okay, everyone. We're going to have to do this in
one take. It's an action scene where a single
gunshot makes all the difference...

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text: So let's use our single shot to nail it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
A standoff under stormy skies! Awesome! Let's get
the cameras rollin', y'all!

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text:
Here we go!
Rolling in ten, nine, eight, seven...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
(It's all or nothing. Heh... My legs are startin' to
tingle. I know this feeling...)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. It's just like steppin' up to the starting
gate. Standin' in front of a strong enemy and
spinnin' the chamber of your revolver.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I just gotta seize the day. Be in the now, with all
my being, focused on what's at hand...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Time to step up and enjoy the challenge!

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text: Action!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kapow! Kapow!

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow... Look at Taiki's expression...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mud flies as Taiki Shuttle powers through the
scene with a look of grim determination on her
face, when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle steps into a deep puddle of mud and
staggers drastically. However...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaw!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I almost wish I could enjoy this forever!
But I'm afraid this is the end of the line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kapow!

text_block_list.name: Enemy Gunman Actor
text_block_list.text:
Hrngh... Ngh... D-damn it all... I thought I had you
dead to rights there...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hands up, crook.
You're finished.

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text: ...! Cuuut!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having focused all of herself into the now, Taiki
Shuttle delivers a jaw-dropping performance. And
with that, the shooting's all wrapped up.

text_block_list.name: Film Festival Presenter
text_block_list.text: And the award for this year's best student film goes to... entry number two, Gunfight at the Yasuda Corral !

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeeesss!
Congrats, Director!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text: W-we did it! We actually did it, Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right! I can't contain myself! We're havin' a
dance and brisket party tonight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Beneath Taiki Shuttle's cheerful energy is an
Umamusume of strength and intensity. I'm glad I
got to participate in the film and see a new side
to her.
